info.name: community-backend 全链路回归集合（E2E）
info.description: 覆盖 auth/user/follow/post/comment/notification/chat/file 主链路 + 错误码回归。建议按顺序运行整个集合。

body.raw:
{
  "title": "E2E 帖子 {{runId}}",
  "contentMd": "# E2E 回归\n\n主链路联调帖子内容。",
  "coverUrl": "https://example.com/cover.png",
  "allowComment": true,
  "tagIds": [],
  "attachmentFileIds": []
}

item.name: A Open Chat Thread With B

exec: pm.test('Mark chat read success', function () { pm.expect(json.code).to.eql(0); });
